content.json:
# ERP Identity Security Dashboard
### Contoso Financial Services — Dynamics 365

Monitoring dashboard for identity-related security events across the ERP environment. Covers sign-in anomalies, privileged access activity, and detection rule performance.

*Author: Jonar*

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize SuccessCount = countif(ResultType == 0), FailedCount = countif(ResultType != 0) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Sign-in Success vs Failure Over Time

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize FailedAttempts = count() by UserPrincipalName
| top 10 by FailedAttempts desc
| render barchart
content.title: Top 10 Users by Failed Sign-in Attempts

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Attempts = count() by IPAddress, Location
| top 10 by Attempts desc
content.title: Top 10 Source IP Addresses

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName has_any ("Add member to role", "Add eligible member to role")
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatedBy = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), TargetResources = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Privileged Role Assignment Activity

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName has_any ("Add eligible member to role in PIM completed", "Add member to role in PIM completed")
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatedBy = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), Result
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: PIM Activation Events

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by Severity
| render piechart
content.title: Incidents by Severity

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project TimeGenerated, Title, Severity, Status
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent Sentinel Incidents

_metadata.note: Sentinel workbook providing identity security monitoring dashboard. Import via Sentinel → Workbooks → Add Workbook → Edit → Advanced Editor, paste this JSON, replace {subscription-id} with actual value.
_metadata.panels: Sign-in trends, failed login analysis, source IP tracking, privileged role activity, PIM activations, incident severity breakdown
_metadata.author: Jonar
